no_access_subtitle: You are not yet authorized to pick up any child.
onboard_no_invites_body: Ask the parent to invite you by entering your email address.
access_confirmed_body: You are now authorized to pick up {{name}}.
onboard_error_invalid_token: Invitation not found or already used.
onboard_error_pin_locked: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
onboard_error_access_code_required: A PIN is required for this invitation.
onboard_error_invalid_access_code: Incorrect code. Check with the parent.
onboard_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
